title: Dashboard
description: Your projects, quick actions and platform status in one place.

steps.title: Your projects
steps.description: Every design you create is listed here with its status.
steps.voiceScript: This is your dashboard. Every solar design you create appears here.
steps.captionText: This is your dashboard. Every solar design you create appears here.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your projects: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Create a design
steps.description: Start a new residential, commercial or industrial PV design.
steps.voiceScript: To begin a new design, use Create Standard Project in the top navigation.
steps.captionText: To begin a new design, use Create Standard Project in the top navigation.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create a design: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Generation Station
steps.description: Utility-scale plants use the 14-step Generation Station wizard.
steps.voiceScript: For utility-scale plants, open Generation Station Design.
steps.captionText: For utility-scale plants, open Generation Station Design.
steps.fallbackMessage: Generation Station: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Marketplace
steps.description: Priced equipment feeds your BOQ and procurement lists.
steps.voiceScript: The Marketplace supplies live equipment prices to your bills of quantities.
steps.captionText: The Marketplace supplies live equipment prices to your bills of quantities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Marketplace: not visible on this page yet.
